request.name: Producer portal payout explanations use meaningful fields and consistent status
request.motivation: Producer payout cards currently expose implementation details and contradictory financial state. For example, a card can show Payable and $0.00 net while its explanation says payment is pending client collection, then ends with raw plan-version and placement UUIDs. This undermines the portal's purpose of explaining payouts without finance assistance.
request.intended_experience: In My Portal, each payout card presents a concise explanation using producer-relevant business terms and values that agree with the displayed status and net amount. Held or collection-gated payouts are labeled as held or pending rather than payable, the explanation identifies the reason and expected trigger, and raw UUIDs are removed from prose and available only as secondary trace metadata when needed.
constraints: Preserve deterministic calculation traceability to the placement and plan version without putting raw UUIDs in the primary explanation prose.
Use the commission record as the source of truth so the status label, net amount, gross amount, and hold explanation cannot contradict one another.
Do not change commission calculation arithmetic or ledger history as part of this presentation correction.
Cover base-rate, tiered-rate, collection-held, guarantee-held, and zero-net scenarios with automated tests.
Keep confidential-placement masking intact in producer-facing content.

plan_body:
## Phase

Meta

## Motivation

Coordinate development work across multiple phases using deterministic, scout-gated execution where each phase begins with a dev scout PR that establishes stable seams before feature work can begin. This ensures phases integrate without conflicts and features complete before phase PRs merge to the default branch.

## Canonical docs

- `docs/prd.md`

## Features

**Planned phases and scouts:**
- (complete) E2E Hardening (#176 scout, branch: phase/e2e-hardening)
- (pending) Arbitration & Simulation (#188 scout, branch: phase/arbitration-simulation)
- (pending) Demo Polish (#200 scout, branch: phase/demo-polish)
- (pending) Web App UX (#201 scout, branch: phase/webapp-ux)

**Execution rules:**
- Feature PRs target phase/* branches; phase PRs target main
- No non-scout issue in a phase may begin until its scout PR merges
- Phases are serialized or parallelizable as indicated in the phase metadata
- Heavy test policy on phase PRs; fast on feature PRs

**Current phase status:**
- (complete) E2E Hardening phase complete (#176, #175, #156, #162 closed)
- (pending) Arbitration & Simulation phase in progress (#188, #186, #187 closed; #199 UI remaining)
- (pending) Demo Polish phase queued
- (pending) Web App UX phase queued

## Test Plan

- (pending) All phase scouts establish stable seams and merge without integration issues
- (pending) Phase features integrate with no cross-phase merge conflicts
- (pending) All E2E tests pass in the default branch after each phase PR merge
- (pending) Scout PRs pass heavy test policy; feature PRs pass fast test policy

---

## Detailed Phase Structure

### Phase: E2E Hardening

Goal: Strengthen the E2E test harness by gating story tests on browser console errors, then add full Finance Admin and Producer role story coverage to the suite.
Parallelizable: yes
Branch: phase/e2e-hardening
Depends on phases: None.
Scout gate: #176
Phase PR: phase/e2e-hardening → main
Test policy: fast on feature PRs, heavy on phase PR

- #176 - [dev-scout] dev-scout: verify E2E harness console error gate and story test seams [risk: 2]

**Parallel group: console-gate-and-producer-e2e**
- #175 - test(e2e): add console error gate — fail story tests on browser console errors and suppress log noise [risk: 2]
- #156 - test: E2E browser tests — Producer user stories (PR-1 through PR-4) [risk: 3]
- #162 - test: E2E browser tests — Finance Admin user stories (FA-1 through FA-5) [risk: 4]

### Phase: Arbitration & Simulation

Goal: Implement dispute arbitration recommendations (Finance/Manager) and producer deal simulation (Producer), both powered by Claude API reasoning over commission logic.
Parallelizable: yes
Branch: phase/arbitration-simulation
Depends on phases: E2E Hardening
Scout gate: #188
Phase PR: phase/arbitration-simulation → main
Test policy: fast on feature PRs, heavy on phase PR

- #188 - [dev-scout] dev-scout: Arbitration & Simulation worker infrastructure and Claude API integration [risk: 3]

**Parallel group: arbitration-and-simulation**
- #186 - feat: Dispute Arbitration Engine — AI-driven payout recommendations [risk: 3]
- #187 - feat: Producer Deal Simulation — payout + dispute-risk forecasting [risk: 3]
- #199 - feat: webapp — add UI surfaces for AI dispute arbitration and deal simulation [risk: 4]

### Phase: Demo Polish

Goal: Populate the demo seed with heterogeneous commission examples across fee structures, tiers, and incentive types.
Parallelizable: no
Serialization reason: Single-issue phase — only #196 (demo seed) lives here.
Branch: phase/demo-polish
Depends on phases: None.
Scout gate: #200
Phase PR: phase/demo-polish → main
Test policy: fast on feature PRs, heavy on phase PR

- #200 - [dev-scout] dev-scout: Demo Polish phase branch and seed data seam [risk: 1]
- #196 - feat: demo seed — heterogeneous commission examples for producer account [risk: 2]

### Phase: Web App UX

Goal: Clean up role-based nav surfaces and add inclusive product documentation accessible to all authenticated roles.
Parallelizable: no
Serialization reason: #198 (nav cleanup) and #197 (product docs) both modify apps/web/src/lib/roleRoutes.ts — serialized to avoid merge conflicts.
Branch: phase/webapp-ux
Depends on phases: None.
Scout gate: #201
Phase PR: phase/webapp-ux → main
Test policy: fast on feature PRs, heavy on phase PR

- #201 - [dev-scout] dev-scout: Web App UX phase branch and routing seam [risk: 1]
- #198 - fix: webapp — remove irrelevant nav surfaces from Manager and FinanceAdmin roles [risk: 2]
- #197 - feat: webapp — inclusive product documentation accessible to all roles [risk: 3]

## Phase: Web App UX

- #203 - feat: webapp — UX overhaul: entity pickers, design-system pass, NavShell rebuild

consumed by NavShell, the Forbidden guard, and post-login redirect"],"shared_state":["roleRoutes.ts is the single source of truth for landing, permitted paths, and nav items per role; this feature changes its matching semantics but must not move gating into components","App.tsx route table changes from stacked component lists to one composed page component per route","useSession.ts /me probe and its console output (the 401 signed-out path must stay silent)"],"migration_effects":[],"config_effects":["eslint no-console rule enabled for apps/web/src (warn-free build required by lint gate)"],"test_surfaces":["bun --bun vitest run tests/component (NavShell, picker, StatusChip, page-composition tests)","bun run test:commission-runs (new list endpoint)","bun run test:executive-analytics (client display-name field)","bun run test:browser (story suites under the #175 console-error gate)","bun run typecheck && bun run lint"],"coupling_risks":[{"surface":"apps/web/src/lib/roleRoutes.ts","risk":"#197 (docs nav item) and #198 (remove leaked nav surfaces) both modify roleRoutes.ts in the same phase","mitigation":"Phase is already serialized for this reason; this issue depends on #197 and #198 and lands last in the phase"},{"surface":"E2E console-error gate (#175)","risk":"Story tests fail on pre-auth 401 console noise if the gate lands before the session-probe fix","mitigation":"This issue includes the probe fix; its browser story asserts zero console errors on the login page"},{"surface":"Detail routes for arbitration/simulation UI (#199, Arbitration & Simulation phase)","risk":"#199 needs child routes like /disputes/:id which today's exact-match routing cannot express","mitigation":"Prefix/child-route matching introduced here is a prerequisite capability, not a conflict; no shared files with #199 beyond roleRoutes.ts entries"}],"spec_quality":"complete","open_questions":[],"parallel_safe":false} -->

## Phase: Unplaced
